title: machaeranthera johnstonii
intro: Machaeranthera johnstonii, also known as Johnston's tansyaster, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antifungal and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Machaeranthera johnstonii is often combined with other plants to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
